revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Category:Lua-based templates]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Bibcode]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Bibcode]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki> [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: fix recently introduced extraneous newlines that is breaking current uses
add bibcode checking logic from sandbox
the old ADS system is now deprecated; we should point readers to the bumblebee (new) system; in principle the old system should still function until October 2019
Use an up-to-date HTTPS URL for Bibcode links in order to reduce the number of redirects and to provide increased privacy and security for users.
deliberately going through (identifier) redirect for consistency with CS1 citation templates and to improve reverse lookup functionality
Undid revision 991657078 by [[Special:Contributions/Newone|Newone]] ([[User talk:Newone|talk]]). return to standard that all of these templates use.
fix recently introduced extraneous newlines that is breaking current uses
add bibcode checking logic from sandbox
the old ADS system is now deprecated; we should point readers to the bumblebee (new) system; in principle the old system should still function until October 2019
Use an up-to-date HTTPS URL for Bibcode links in order to reduce the number of redirects and to provide increased privacy and security for users.
deliberately going through (identifier) redirect for consistency with CS1 citation templates and to improve reverse lookup functionality
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<includeonly>[[bibcode (identifier)|Bibcode]]:[https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}/abstract {{{1|{{{id}}}}}}]{{#invoke:check bibcode|check_bibcode|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>[[bibcode (identifier)|Bibcode]]:[https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}/abstract {{{1|{{{id}}}}}}]{{#invoke:check bibcode|check_bibcode|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bibcode here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bibcode for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>[[bibcode (identifier)|Bibcode]]:[https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}/abstract {{{1|{{{id}}}}}}]{{#invoke:check bibcode|check_bibcode|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
